Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(****************************************************************

 Products in bicategories

 In this file we define the notion of product diagram in arbitrary
 bicategories. For this definition, there are 2 possibilities. One
 could either write universal properties, which expresses the
 existence of a morphism up to a unique 2-cell. Alternatively, one
 could define the universal property via the hom-categories.
 Here, we choose the first approach.

 *****************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Product.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {b₁ b₂ : B}.

  (** Cones on the diagram *)
  Definition binprod_cone
    : UU
    := ∑ (p : B), p --> b₁ × p --> b₂.

  Coercion binprod_cone_obj
           (p : binprod_cone)
    : B
    := pr1 p.

  Definition binprod_cone_pr1
             (p : binprod_cone)
    : p --> b₁
    := pr12 p.

  Definition binprod_cone_pr2
             (p : binprod_cone)
    : p --> b₂
    := pr22 p.

  Definition make_binprod_cone
             (p : B)
             (π₁ : p --> b₁)
             (π₂ : p --> b₂)
    : binprod_cone
    := (p ,, π₁ ,, π₂).

  (** 1-cells between cones *)
  Definition binprod_1cell
             (p q : binprod_cone)
    : UU
    := ∑ (φ : p --> q),
       invertible_2cell
         (φ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
         (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
       ×
       invertible_2cell
         (φ · binprod_cone_pr2 q)
         (binprod_cone_pr2 p).

  Coercion binprod_1cell_1cell
           {p q : binprod_cone}
           (φ : binprod_1cell p q)
    : p --> q
    := pr1 φ.

  Definition binprod_1cell_pr1
             {p q : binprod_cone}
             (φ : binprod_1cell p q)
    : invertible_2cell
        (φ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
        (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
    := pr12 φ.

  Definition binprod_1cell_pr2
             {p q : binprod_cone}
             (φ : binprod_1cell p q)
    : invertible_2cell
        (φ · binprod_cone_pr2 q)
        (binprod_cone_pr2 p)
    := pr22 φ.

  Definition make_binprod_1cell
             {p q : binprod_cone}
             (φ : p --> q)
             (τ : invertible_2cell
                    (φ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
                    (binprod_cone_pr1 p))
             (θ : invertible_2cell
                    (φ · binprod_cone_pr2 q)
                    (binprod_cone_pr2 p))
    : binprod_1cell p q
    := (φ ,, τ ,, θ).

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ, ψ: binprod_1cell p q
r₁: pr1 φ = pr1 ψ
r₂: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 φ) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 ψ)
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 φ) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 ψ)
φ = ψ

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ, ψ: binprod_1cell p q
r₁: pr1 φ = pr1 ψ
r₂: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 φ) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 ψ)
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 φ) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 ψ)
φ = ψ

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ: binprod_1cell p q
r₁: pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄) = pr1 ψ
r₂: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 ψ)
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) (pr1 ψ) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 ψ)
φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = ψ

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
ψ₂: invertible_2cell (ψ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
ψ₃: ψ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₁: pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄) = pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)
r₂: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
ψ₂: invertible_2cell (ψ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
ψ₃: ψ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₁: φ₁ = ψ₁
r₂: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) r₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = ψ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 ψ₂
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄

  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p

 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄

φ₂ = ψ₂

isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat

  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)

  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p

   (pr1 (φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)

pr1 φ₂ = pr1 ψ₂

 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, ψ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

        intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat

p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)

ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p

r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 ψ₂

      exact r₂.

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 φ₂
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄ = φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 φ₂
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
φ₃,, φ₄ = ψ₃,, ψ₄

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 φ₂
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)
φ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
φ₄: is_invertible_2cell φ₃
ψ₃: φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 q ==> binprod_cone_pr2 p
ψ₄: is_invertible_2cell ψ₃
r₂: pr1 φ₂ = (id₂ φ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 q) • pr1 φ₂
r₃: pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, φ₃,, φ₄))
   (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr2 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄))
pr1 (φ₃,, φ₄) = pr1 (ψ₃,, ψ₄)

   (pr1 (φ₁,, φ₂,, ψ₃,, ψ₄)) (idpath φ₁)
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 q)

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone
φ₁: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
φ₂: invertible_2cell (φ₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p, q: binprod_cone

  (binprod_cone_pr1 p)

r₃: φ₃ = ψ₃
φ₃ = ψ₃

    exact r₃.
  Qed.

  (** Statements of universal mapping properties of products *)
  Section UniversalMappingPropertyStatements.
    Variable (p : binprod_cone).

    Definition binprod_ump_1
      : UU
      := ∏ (q : binprod_cone), binprod_1cell q p.

    Definition binprod_ump_2
      : UU
      := ∏ (a : B)
           (φ ψ : a --> p)
           (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
           (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p),
         ∃! (γ : φ ==> ψ),
         (γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α)
         ×
         (γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β).

    Definition has_binprod_ump
      : UU
      := binprod_ump_1 × binprod_ump_2.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_1
               (H : has_binprod_ump)
      : binprod_ump_1
      := pr1 H.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2
               (H : has_binprod_ump)
      : binprod_ump_2
      := pr2 H.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2_cell
      : UU
      := ∏ (a : B)
           (φ ψ : a --> p)
           (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
           (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p),
         φ ==> ψ.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr1
               (υ : has_binprod_ump_2_cell)
      := ∏ (a : B)
           (φ ψ : a --> p)
           (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
           (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p),
         υ a φ ψ α β ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2
               (υ : has_binprod_ump_2_cell)
      := ∏ (a : B)
           (φ ψ : a --> p)
           (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
           (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p),
         υ a φ ψ α β ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β.

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
      : UU
      := ∏ (a : B)
           (φ ψ : a --> p)
           (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
           (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                ==>
                ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
           (γ δ : φ ==> ψ)
           (γpr1 : γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α)
           (γpr2 : γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)
           (δpr1 : δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α)
           (δpr2 : δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β),
         γ = δ.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
υ₁: binprod_ump_1
υ₂: has_binprod_ump_2_cell
υ₂pr1: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr1 υ₂
υ₂pr2: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2 υ₂
υ₃: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
has_binprod_ump

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
υ₁: binprod_ump_1
υ₂: has_binprod_ump_2_cell
υ₂pr1: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr1 υ₂
υ₂pr2: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2 υ₂
υ₃: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
has_binprod_ump

υ₂pr2: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2 υ₂
υ₃: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
binprod_ump_1

υ₂: has_binprod_ump_2_cell
υ₂pr1: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr1 υ₂
υ₂pr2: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2 υ₂
υ₃: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
binprod_ump_2

υ₂: has_binprod_ump_2_cell
υ₂pr1: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr1 υ₂
υ₂pr2: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_pr2 υ₂
υ₃: has_binprod_ump_2_cell_unique
binprod_ump_1
 exact υ₁.

   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)

× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

q: B

α: f₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==>
f₂ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: f₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==>
f₂ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
isaprop
  (∑ γ : f₁ ==> f₂,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)
 abstract
            (use invproofirrelevance ;
             intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
             use subtypePath ;
             [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
             exact (υ₃ q
                       f₁ f₂
                       α β
                       (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                       (pr12 φ₁) (pr22 φ₁)
                       (pr12 φ₂) (pr22 φ₂))).

 υ₂ q f₁ f₂ α β ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)
  (make_binprod_ump_subproof0 υ₂ υ₂pr1 q f₁ f₂ α β)
 abstract (apply υ₂pr2).
    Defined.
  End UniversalMappingPropertyStatements.

  Section Projections.
    Context {p : binprod_cone}
            (H : has_binprod_ump p).

    Definition binprod_ump_1cell
               {a : B}
               (apr1 : a --> b₁)
               (apr2 : a --> b₂)
      : a --> p
      := has_binprod_ump_1 _ H (make_binprod_cone a apr1 apr2).

    Definition binprod_ump_1cell_pr1
               (a : B)
               (apr1 : a --> b₁)
               (apr2 : a --> b₂)
      : invertible_2cell
          (binprod_ump_1cell apr1 apr2 · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
          apr1
      := binprod_1cell_pr1
           (has_binprod_ump_1 _ H (make_binprod_cone a apr1 apr2)).

    Definition binprod_ump_1cell_pr2
               (a : B)
               (apr1 : a --> b₁)
               (apr2 : a --> b₂)
      : invertible_2cell
          (binprod_ump_1cell apr1 apr2 · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
          apr2
      := binprod_1cell_pr2 (has_binprod_ump_1 _ H (make_binprod_cone a apr1 apr2)).

    Definition binprod_ump_2cell
               {a : B}
               {φ ψ : a --> p}
               (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
               (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
      : φ ==> ψ
      := pr11 (has_binprod_ump_2 _ H a φ ψ α β).

    Definition binprod_ump_2cell_pr1
               {a : B}
               {φ ψ : a --> p}
               (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
               (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
      : binprod_ump_2cell α β ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
      := pr121 (has_binprod_ump_2 _ H a φ ψ α β).

    Definition binprod_ump_2cell_pr2
               {a : B}
               {φ ψ : a --> p}
               (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
               (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
                    ==>
                    ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
      : binprod_ump_2cell α β ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
      := pr221 (has_binprod_ump_2 _ H a φ ψ α β).

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
H: has_binprod_ump p
a: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ a, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
γ, δ: φ ==> ψ
γpr1: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
γpr2: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
δpr1: δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
δpr2: δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
γ = δ

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
H: has_binprod_ump p
a: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ a, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
γ, δ: φ ==> ψ
γpr1: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
γpr2: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
δpr1: δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
δpr2: δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
γ = δ

      exact (maponpaths
               pr1
               (proofirrelevance
                  _
                  (isapropifcontr (has_binprod_ump_2 _ H a φ ψ α β))
                  (γ ,, (γpr1 ,, γpr2))
                  (δ ,, (δpr1 ,, δpr2)))).
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
H: has_binprod_ump p
a: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ a, p ⟧
γ, δ: φ ==> ψ
ppr1: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p
ppr2: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p
γ = δ

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
H: has_binprod_ump p
a: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ a, p ⟧
γ, δ: φ ==> ψ
ppr1: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p
ppr2: γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p
γ = δ

      exact (maponpaths
               pr1
               (proofirrelevance
                  _
                  (isapropifcontr
                     (has_binprod_ump_2
                        _
                        H a φ ψ
                        (γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p)
                        (γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p)))
                  (γ ,, (idpath _ ,, idpath _))
                  (δ ,, (!ppr1 ,, !ppr2)))).
    Qed.

  End Projections.

        (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₁ q))

           (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₂ q)))))

q: binprod_cone
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₁ q))
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₂ q))))

          
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
χ₁, χ₂: has_binprod_ump p
q: binprod_cone
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₁ q))
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₂ q))))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
χ₁, χ₂: has_binprod_ump p
q: binprod_cone
pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₁ q)) =
(idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (pr1 χ₁ q)) (pr1 (pr1 χ₂ q))
   (isotoid_2_1 HB_2_1
      (make_invertible_2cell
         (binprod_ump_2cell_invertible χ₂
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₁ q))
               (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                  (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₂ q))))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₁ q))
               (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                  (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₂ q)))))))
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p)
• pr1 (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₂ q))

      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₁ q))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
            (binprod_1cell_pr1 (pr1 χ₂ q))))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₁ q))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
            (binprod_1cell_pr2 (pr1 χ₂ q)))))
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p)

b₁, b₂: B

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
p: binprod_cone
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
χ₁, χ₂: has_binprod_ump p
x: B
x0, x1: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
x2: x0 · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==>
x1 · binprod_cone_pr1 p
x3: x0 · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==>
x1 · binprod_cone_pr2 p
pr2 χ₁ x x0 x1 x2 x3 = pr2 χ₂ x x0 x1 x2 x3

      apply isapropiscontr.
  Qed.

    (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂)

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
x: B
univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟶ univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁
 exact (post_comp x (binprod_cone_pr1 p)).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
x: B
univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟶ univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂
 exact (post_comp x (binprod_cone_pr2 p)).
  Defined.

  Definition binprod_cat_ump
             (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
             (p : binprod_cone)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : B),
       @left_adjoint_equivalence
         bicat_of_univ_cats
         _ _
         (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x).

x: B

  ((λ t : B,
    left_adjoint_equivalence
      (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p t)) x)

    exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.

∥ hfiber
    (λ f0 : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ f, g ⟧,
     # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f0) α ∥

  (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂)
⟦ postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x f,
postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x g ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f0 : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ f, g ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f0) α)

b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: has_binprod_ump p
x: B
f, g: univ_hom HB_2_1 x p
α: univalent_category_binproduct
  (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁) 
  (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂)
⟦ postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x f,
postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x g ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (hfiber
     (λ f0 : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ f, g ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f0) α)

  Defined.

  Section BinProdUMPCatUMP1.
    Context (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
            (p : binprod_cone)
            (H : binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p)
            (q : binprod_cone).

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
B ⟦ q, p ⟧

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
B ⟦ q, p ⟧

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
univalent_category_binproduct
  (univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₁)
  (univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₂)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₁
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
(λ _ : univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₁,
 univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₂) 
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₁
 exact (binprod_cone_pr1 q).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
(λ _ : univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₁,
 univ_hom HB_2_1 (pr1 q) b₂) (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (binprod_cone_pr2 q).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr1 p) (binprod_cone_pr1 q)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr1 p) (binprod_cone_pr1 q)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
z_iso
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr1 p) (binprod_cone_pr1 q)

      exact (pr1 (category_binproduct_z_iso_inv
                    _ _
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                       (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso
                          _ _
                          (left_equivalence_counit_iso
                             (H (pr1 q))))
                       (binprod_cone_pr1 q ,, binprod_cone_pr2 q)))).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr2 p) (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr2 p) (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
z_iso
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor
   · binprod_cone_pr2 p) (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      exact (pr2 (category_binproduct_z_iso_inv
                    _ _
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                       (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso
                          _ _
                          (left_equivalence_counit_iso
                             (H (pr1 q))))
                       (binprod_cone_pr1 q ,, binprod_cone_pr2 q)))).
    Defined.
  End BinProdUMPCatUMP1.

  Section BinProdUMPCatUMP2.
    Context (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
            (p : binprod_cone)
            (H : binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p)
            {x : B}
            {φ ψ : x --> p}
            (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
            (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p).

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : φ ==> ψ,
   x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,

× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
x0: φ ==> ψ
isaprop
  (x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
   × x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property.
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
Hf:= pr2
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
# (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) (pr1 ζ₁) = α,, β

H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧

β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p

× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct

pr1 ζ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
Hf:= pr2
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))

      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
 exact (pr12 ζ₁).

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
Hf:= pr2
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
Hf:= pr2
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
 exact (pr12 ζ₂).
        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
Hf:= pr2
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)

        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat

  (hfiber
     (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
      # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
     (α,, β))
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
 exact (pr22 ζ₂).
    Qed.

p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p

γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p

  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) 
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): ∥ hfiber
    (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
     # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
    (α,, β) ∥
fib: hfiber
  (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
   # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
  (α,, β)
pr1 fib ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

          
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
m:= pr1
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) 
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): ∥ hfiber
    (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
     # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
    (α,, β) ∥
fib: hfiber
  (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
   # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
  (α,, β)
pr1 fib ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 fib)).
          
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
m:= pr1
  (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful
     (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
     (univalent_category_binproduct
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
     (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
     (fully_faithful_from_equivalence
        (univ_hom HB_2_1 x p)
        (univalent_category_binproduct
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₁)
           (univ_hom HB_2_1 x b₂))
        (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x)
        (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat
           (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) 
           (H x)))) φ ψ 
  (α,, β): ∥ hfiber
    (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
     # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
    (α,, β) ∥
fib: hfiber
  (λ f : univ_hom HB_2_1 x p ⟦ φ, ψ ⟧,
   # (postcomp_binprod_cone HB_2_1 p x) f)
  (α,, β)
pr1 fib ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β
 exact (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (pr2 fib)).
    Defined.
  End BinProdUMPCatUMP2.

  
B: bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
has_binprod_ump p

binprod_ump_2 p

binprod_ump_1 p

binprod_1cell q p

B ⟦ q, p ⟧

p: binprod_cone

invertible_2cell (?φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p

invertible_2cell (?φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
B ⟦ q, p ⟧
 exact (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor HB_2_1 p H q).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor HB_2_1 p H q
   · binprod_cone_pr1 p) (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_pr1 HB_2_1 p H q).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
q: binprod_cone
invertible_2cell
  (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_mor HB_2_1 p H q
   · binprod_cone_pr2 p) (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
 exact (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_1_pr2 HB_2_1 p H q).
    
B: bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
binprod_ump_2 p
 
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
H: binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p
x: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ x, p ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 p
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 p ==> ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 p
∃! γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 p = α
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 p = β

      exact (has_binprod_cat_ump_binprod_ump_2_iscontr HB_2_1 p H α β).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
has_binprod_ump p ≃ binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p

p: binprod_cone
has_binprod_ump p ≃ binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p

B: bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
p: binprod_cone
isaprop (binprod_cat_ump HB_2_1 p)
 apply isaprop_binprod_cat_ump.
  Defined.
End Product.

Arguments binprod_cone {_} _ _.

Definition has_binprod
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := ∏ (b₁ b₂ : B),
     ∑ (p : binprod_cone b₁ b₂),
     has_binprod_ump p.

Definition bicat_with_binprod
  : UU
  := ∑ (B : bicat), has_binprod B.

Coercion bicat_with_binprod_to_bicat
         (B : bicat_with_binprod)
  : bicat
  := pr1 B.

Definition binprod_of
           (B : bicat_with_binprod)
  : has_binprod B
  := pr2 B.

Section StandardFunctions.
  Context (B : bicat_with_binprod).

  Definition binprod
             (b₁ b₂ : B)
    : B
    := pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂).

  Local Notation "b₁ ⊗ b₂" := (binprod b₁ b₂).

  Definition binprod_pr1
             (b₁ b₂ : B)
    : b₁ ⊗ b₂ --> b₁
    := binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)).

  Definition binprod_pr2
             (b₁ b₂ : B)
    : b₁ ⊗ b₂ --> b₂
    := binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)).

  Local Notation "'π₁'" := (binprod_pr1 _ _).
  Local Notation "'π₂'" := (binprod_pr2 _ _).

  Definition prod_1cell
             {a b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a --> b₁)
             (g : a --> b₂)
    : a --> b₁ ⊗ b₂
    := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) f g.

  Local Notation "⟨ f , g ⟩" := (prod_1cell f g).

  Definition prod_1cell_pr1
             {a b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a --> b₁)
             (g : a --> b₂)
    : invertible_2cell (⟨ f , g ⟩ · π₁) f
    := binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) _ f g.

  Definition prod_1cell_pr2
             {a b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a --> b₁)
             (g : a --> b₂)
    : invertible_2cell (⟨ f , g ⟩ · π₂) g
    := binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) _ f g.

  Definition pair_1cell
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a₁ --> b₁)
             (g : a₂ --> b₂)
    : a₁ ⊗ a₂ --> b₁ ⊗ b₂
    := ⟨ π₁ · f , π₂ · g ⟩.

  Local Notation "f '⊗₁' g" := (pair_1cell f g).

  Definition pair_1cell_pr1
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a₁ --> b₁)
             (g : a₂ --> b₂)
    : invertible_2cell (f ⊗₁ g · π₁) (π₁ · f)
    := prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g).

  Definition pair_1cell_pr2
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             (f : a₁ --> b₁)
             (g : a₂ --> b₂)
    : invertible_2cell (f ⊗₁ g · π₂) (π₂ · g)
    := prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g).

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α • (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)^-1).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟨ f₁, g₁ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
⟨ f₂, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β • (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)^-1).
  Defined.

  Local Notation "⟪ α , β ⟫" := (prod_2cell α β).

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell ⟪ α, β ⟫

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell ⟪ α, β ⟫

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α)
   • (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂) ^-1)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β)
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂) ^-1)

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α)
   • (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β)
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  Definition prod_2cell_pr1
             {a b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : ⟪ α , β ⟫ ▹ π₁
      =
      prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α • (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)^-1
    := binprod_ump_2cell_pr1 _ _ _.

  Definition prod_2cell_pr2
             {a b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : ⟪ α , β ⟫ ▹ π₂
      =
      prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β • (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)^-1
    := binprod_ump_2cell_pr2 _ _ _.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
(⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₁) • prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂ =
prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
(⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₁) • prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂ =
prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₁ = (prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α) • ?Hε ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₁ =
(prod_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ • α)
• (prod_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂) ^-1

    apply prod_2cell_pr1.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
(⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₂) • prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂ =
prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
(⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₂) • prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂ =
prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₂ = (prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β) • ?Hε ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
β: g₁ ==> g₂
⟪ α, β ⟫ ▹ π₂ =
(prod_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ • β)
• (prod_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂) ^-1

    apply prod_2cell_pr2.
  Qed.

  Definition pair_2cell
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a₁ --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ ==> f₂ ⊗₁ g₂
    := prod_2cell (π₁ ◃ α) (π₂ ◃ β).

  Local Notation "α '⊗₂' β" := (pair_2cell α β).

  Definition pair_2cell_pr1
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a₁ --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : (α ⊗₂ β) ▹ π₁
      =
      prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
      • (π₁ ◃ α)
      • (prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂))^-1
    := prod_2cell_pr1 (π₁ ◃ α) (π₂ ◃ β).

  Definition pair_2cell_pr2
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a₁ --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : (α ⊗₂ β) ▹ π₂
      =
      prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
      • (π₂ ◃ β)
      • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂))^-1
    := prod_2cell_pr2 (π₁ ◃ α) (π₂ ◃ β).

  Definition pair_2cell_pr1_alt
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a₁ --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : (α ⊗₂ β) ▹ π₁
      • prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)
      =
      prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
      • (π₁ ◃ α)
    := prod_2cell_pr1_alt (π₁ ◃ α) (π₂ ◃ β).

  Definition pair_2cell_pr2_alt
             {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
             {f₁ f₂ : a₁ --> b₁}
             {g₁ g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
             (α : f₁ ==> f₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : (α ⊗₂ β) ▹ π₂
      • prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)
      =
      prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
      • (π₂ ◃ β)
    := prod_2cell_pr2_alt (π₁ ◃ α) (π₂ ◃ β).

  (** Laws for product of 1-cells *)
  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂)) ==>
⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂)) ==>
⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂)) ==>
⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
             • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr1 _ _)
             • (prod_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂)) ==>
⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B c₁ c₂))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
             • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr2 _ _)
             • (prod_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell (f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩) ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell (f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩) ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
f · ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ ==> ⟨ f · g₁, f · g₂ ⟩
 exact (precomp_prod_1cell f g₁ g₂).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (precomp_prod_1cell f g₁ g₂)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator f ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ π₁
    • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr1 g₁ g₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr1 (f · g₁) (f · g₂)) ^-1)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator f ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ π₂
    • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr2 g₁ g₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (f · g₁) (f · g₂)) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator f ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ π₁
    • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr1 g₁ g₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr1 (f · g₁) (f · g₂)) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr1 g₁ g₂)

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator f ⟨ g₁, g₂ ⟩ π₂
    • (f ◃ prod_1cell_pr2 g₁ g₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (f · g₁) (f · g₂)) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b, c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b, c₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (prod_1cell_pr2 g₁ g₂)

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  (** Pseudofunctoriality of pairing 1-cells *)
  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b ==> id₁ (a ⊗ b)

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b ==> id₁ (a ⊗ b)

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b)) ==>
id₁ (a ⊗ b)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b)) ==>
id₁ (a ⊗ b)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b)) ==>
id₁ (a ⊗ b)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b))
 exact (pair_1cell_pr1 _ _ • runitor _ • linvunitor _).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b)) ==>
id₁ (a ⊗ b)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a b))
 exact (pair_1cell_pr2 _ _ • runitor _ • linvunitor _).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
invertible_2cell (id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b) (id₁ (a ⊗ b))

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
invertible_2cell (id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b) (id₁ (a ⊗ b))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b ==> id₁ (a ⊗ b)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
id₁ a ⊗₁ id₁ b ==> id₁ (a ⊗ b)
 exact (pair_1cell_id_id a b).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_id_id a b)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pair_1cell_pr1 (id₁ a) (id₁ b) • runitor π₁)
   • linvunitor π₁)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pair_1cell_pr2 (id₁ a) (id₁ b) • runitor π₂)
   • linvunitor π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pair_1cell_pr1 (id₁ a) (id₁ b) • runitor π₁)
   • linvunitor π₁)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr1 (id₁ a) (id₁ b))

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pair_1cell_pr2 (id₁ a) (id₁ b) • runitor π₂)
   • linvunitor π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b: B
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr2 (id₁ a) (id₁ b))

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) ==> f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) ==> f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃)) ==>
f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃)) ==>
f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃)) ==>
f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ pair_1cell_pr1 _ _)
             • lassociator _ _ _
             • (pair_1cell_pr1 _ _ ▹ _)
             • rassociator _ _ _
             • (pair_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃)) ==>
f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₃ b₃))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ pair_1cell_pr2 _ _)
             • lassociator _ _ _
             • (pair_1cell_pr2 _ _ ▹ _)
             • rassociator _ _ _
             • (pair_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
invertible_2cell (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂))
  (f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂))

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
invertible_2cell (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂))
  (f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) ==> f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) ==> f₁ · f₂ ⊗₁ (g₁ · g₂)
 exact (pair_1cell_comp f₁ f₂ g₁ g₂).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_comp f₁ f₂ g₁ g₂)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) π₁
       • (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ ◃ pair_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂))
      • lassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) π₁ f₂)
     • (pair_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ ▹ f₂))
    • rassociator π₁ f₁ f₂)
   • (pair_1cell_pr1 (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)) ^-1)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) π₂
       • (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ ◃ pair_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂))
      • lassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) π₂ g₂)
     • (pair_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ ▹ g₂))
    • rassociator π₂ g₁ g₂)
   • (pair_1cell_pr2 (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) π₁
       • (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ ◃ pair_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂))
      • lassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) π₁ f₂)
     • (pair_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁ ▹ f₂))
    • rassociator π₁ f₁ f₂)
   • (pair_1cell_pr1 (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁)

        
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr1 f₂ g₂)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr1 f₁ g₁)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) (f₂ ⊗₁ g₂) π₂
       • (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ ◃ pair_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂))
      • lassociator (f₁ ⊗₁ g₁) π₂ g₂)
     • (pair_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁ ▹ g₂))
    • rassociator π₂ g₁ g₂)
   • (pair_1cell_pr2 (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)) ^-1)
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁)

        
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr2 f₂ g₂)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pair_1cell_pr2 f₁ g₁)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  (** Functoriality of pairing 2-cells *)
  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g = id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g = id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?α
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?β
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?α
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?β

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (pr2 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 apply id₂.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f ⊗₁ g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 apply id₂.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g) • (π₁ ◃ id₂ f))
• (prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g) • id₂ (π₁ · f))
• (prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
• (prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (⟨ π₁ · f, π₂ · g ⟩ · π₁) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ f ⊗₂ id₂ g
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g) • (π₂ ◃ id₂ g))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g) • id₂ (π₂ · g))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)) ^-1 =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (⟨ π₁ · f, π₂ · g ⟩ · π₂) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂ (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
 
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂
  (f ⊗₁ g
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ • α₂) ⊗₂ (β₁ • β₂) = α₁ ⊗₂ β₁ • α₂ ⊗₂ β₂

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ • α₂) ⊗₂ (β₁ • β₂) = α₁ ⊗₂ β₁ • α₂ ⊗₂ β₂

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f₃ ⊗₁ g₃ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f₃ ⊗₁ g₃ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ • α₂) ⊗₂ (β₁ • β₂)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?α
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ • α₂) ⊗₂ (β₁ • β₂)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?β
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ ⊗₂ β₁ • α₂ ⊗₂ β₂)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?α
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ ⊗₂ β₁ • α₂ ⊗₂ β₂)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) = ?β

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (pr2 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f₃ ⊗₁ g₃ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr1 _ _ • (π₁ ◃ (α₁ • α₂)) • (prod_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1).

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧

β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
f₁ ⊗₁ g₁ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
f₃ ⊗₁ g₃ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr2 _ _ • (π₂ ◃ (β₁ • β₂)) • (prod_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂

β₂: g₂ ==> g₃

▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =

• (prod_1cell_pr1 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1
 exact (pair_2cell_pr1 _ _).

• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

β₁: g₁ ==> g₂

β₂: g₂ ==> g₃

β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(id₂ (π₁ · f₂) • (π₁ ◃ α₂))

      apply idpath.

• ((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1) = ?b
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
?b =
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁) • (π₂ ◃ (β₁ • β₂)))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(α₁ ⊗₂ β₁
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
• ((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
α₁ ⊗₂ β₁ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
?y'

        apply pair_2cell_pr2.
      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁) • (π₂ ◃ β₁))
 • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) ^-1)
• ((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1) =
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁) • (π₂ ◃ (β₁ • β₂)))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁) • (π₂ ◃ β₁))
 • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) ^-1)
• ((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
   • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1) =
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
 • ((π₂ ◃ β₁) • (π₂ ◃ β₂)))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
• ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
   • ((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) ^-1
      • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)
         • ((π₂ ◃ β₂)
            • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1)))) =
prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₁) (π₂ · g₁)
• ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
   • ((π₂ ◃ β₂)
      • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) ^-1
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)
   • ((π₂ ◃ β₂)
      • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1)) =
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(((prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) ^-1
  • prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₂) (π₂ · g₂)) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1 =
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(id₂ (π₂ · g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1 =
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂, f₃: B ⟦ a₁, b₁ ⟧
g₁, g₂, g₃: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
α₁: f₁ ==> f₂
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
α₂: f₂ ==> f₃
β₂: g₂ ==> g₃
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1 =
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • (prod_1cell_pr2 (π₁ · f₃) (π₂ · g₃)) ^-1

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Eta for binary products *)
  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩ ==> g

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩ ==> g

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 apply (pr2 B).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr1 _ _).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) ==>
g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))
 exact (prod_1cell_pr2 _ _).
  Defined.

a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
g ==> ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩

B: bicat_with_binprod

 exact ((prod_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod

· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

B: bicat_with_binprod

g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_eta_map g • prod_1cell_eta_inv g =
id₂ ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩

g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_eta_map g • prod_1cell_eta_inv g)

B: bicat_with_binprod

g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_eta_map g
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
• (prod_1cell_eta_inv g
   ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =

▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
(binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (pr2 B b₁ b₂))
   (prod_1cell_pr1 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
   (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
• (binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (pr2 B b₁ b₂))
     (prod_1cell_pr1
        (g
         · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
        (g · π₂)) ^-1
     (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁)
        (g
         · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))))
     ^-1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂ ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_pr1 (g · π₁) (g · π₂)
• (prod_1cell_pr1
     (g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
     (g · π₂)) ^-1 =
id₂ ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =

▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧

  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂
  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_binprod

   (prod_1cell_pr1 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
   (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

     (prod_1cell_pr1
        (g
         · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
        (g · π₂)) ^-1
     (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁)
        (g
         · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))))
     ^-1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂ ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

a, b₁, b₂: B

prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁) (g · π₂)
• (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁)
     (g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))))
  ^-1 =

▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

a, b₁, b₂: B

id₂
  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =

▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
id₂
  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂
  (⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
   · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_eta_inv g • prod_1cell_eta_map g = id₂ g

a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_eta_inv g • prod_1cell_eta_map g = id₂ g

    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧

a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧

▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂ g ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

 apply (pr2 B).
    
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
(prod_1cell_eta_inv g • prod_1cell_eta_map g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)) =
id₂ g ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

(prod_1cell_eta_inv g
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))

   ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =

a, b₁, b₂: B

   (prod_1cell_pr1
      (g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
      (g · π₂)) ^-1
   (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁)
      (g · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))))
   ^-1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
• (binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (pr2 B b₁ b₂))
     (prod_1cell_pr1 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
     (prod_1cell_pr2 (g · π₁) (g · π₂))
   ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))) =
id₂ g ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

   (g · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂)))
   (g · π₂)) ^-1 • prod_1cell_pr1 (g · π₁) (g · π₂) =
id₂ g ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B b₁ b₂))

a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_eta_map g • prod_1cell_eta_inv g =
id₂ ⟨ g · π₁, g · π₂ ⟩
 exact (prod_1cell_eta_map_inv g).
      
B: bicat_with_binprod
a, b₁, b₂: B
g: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⊗ b₂ ⟧
prod_1cell_eta_inv g • prod_1cell_eta_map g = id₂ g
 exact (prod_1cell_eta_inv_map g).
  Defined.

  (** Standard lemmas *)
  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
lunitor (f ⊗₁ g) =
(((pair_1cell_id_id_invertible a₁ b₁) ^-1 ▹ f ⊗₁ g)
 • pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g)
• lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g

  
B: bicat_with_binprod
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
lunitor (f ⊗₁ g) =
(((pair_1cell_id_id_invertible a₁ b₁) ^-1 ▹ f ⊗₁ g)
 • pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g)
• lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
lunitor (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂)) =
((((pair_1cell_id_id_invertible a₁ b₁) ^-1 ▹ f ⊗₁ g)
  • pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g)
 • lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
lunitor (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂)) =
((((pair_1cell_id_id_invertible a₁ b₁) ^-1 ▹ f ⊗₁ g)
  • pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g)
 • lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
has_binprod_ump (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))
 apply (pr2 B).

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
lunitor (f ⊗₁ g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂)) =
((((pair_1cell_id_id_invertible a₁ b₁) ^-1 ▹ f ⊗₁ g)
  • pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g)
 • lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))

 • (pair_1cell_comp (id₁ a₁) f (id₁ b₁) g
    ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (binprod_of B a₂ b₂))))
• (lunitor f ⊗₂ lunitor g
